subject: A humanoid figure with pointed ears reaches a glowing hand into a dense magical hedge
description: A humanoid figure — pointy-eared, wearing a wide-brimmed hat and layered coat with a harness and buckles — leans toward a dense bush or hedge, extending one hand into it. The hand and the bush both glow green-gold where they make contact, suggesting a magical communion with the plant. The figure's expression is focused and calm. The setting appears to be an urban garden or alleyway, with stone walls and overgrown foliage. The palette is earthy: brown leather, purple-grey fabric, and the bright chartreuse-green of the glowing plant.
foreground: Elf-eared figure in hat and layered coat, hand glowing where it touches a hedge
background: Stone wall, overgrown foliage, urban alley
emotion: quiet focus; intimate connection between figure and plant
